creator: xbddc.ho@gmail.com
text:
coda-client-6.1.1 and coda-server-6.1.1 fails to build when devel/rpc2 goes to 2.4, it needs to be updated to 6.1.2 

root@yoshi[/usr/ports/net/coda6_server]# make
..
gmake[2]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/net/coda6_server/work/coda-6.1.1/coda-src/venus'
..
c++ -fno-exceptions -fcheck-new -Wall -MD -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -D__BSD44__ -I. -I/usr/ports/net/coda6_server/work/coda-6.1.1/include -I/usr/ports/net/coda6_server/work/coda-6.1.1 -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe  -DVENUS -DTIMING -DVENUSDEBUG -I/usr/local/include   -c -o comm.o comm.cc
comm.cc:55:23: rpc2/fail.h: No such file or directory
comm.cc:105: error: `FailFilterSide' does not name a type
gmake[2]: *** [comm.o] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/coda6_server/work/coda-6.1.1/coda-src/venus'
----> Error in venus
gmake[1]: *** [Coda] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/net/coda6_server/work/coda-6.1.1/coda-src'
----> Error in coda-src
gmake: *** [Coda] Error 1
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/net/coda6_server.
root@yoshi[/usr/ports/net/coda6_server]#
